speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Your house
questions: Do you live in a house or an apartment?
How many bedrooms are there in your home?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I live in a house. There are three bedrooms and one bathroom. Yes, there is a small garden in front of the house. My favourite room is the living room.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Furniture
questions: Is there a sofa in your living room?
Are there any shelves in your bedroom?
Do you want to buy any new furniture?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, there is a big sofa in my living room. There are two shelves in my bedroom. I want to buy a new lamp for my desk.
